channel.title: SQL on Gilbert N. Onyenwezi | Operations leader, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence Portfolio

item.title: Supply Chain KPI Dashboard
item.description:
Problem

Operations teams often lack a unified view of performance across safety, quality, service, and cost.

Objective

Build a KPI-driven dashboard that enables real-time visibility into performance and faster issue identification.

Tools

SQL, Python, Dashboarding Tools
